contents: Ok,刚才有空去看了下NYT的描述，更让我加深对导演的信任: Mr. Allen was accused of sexually abusing his daughter last August at Ms. Farrow's house in Bridgewater, Conn. Six months ago, a team of investigators at Yale-New Haven Hospital concluded that no sexual abuse had taken place.人家Yale New Haven Hospital 没有发现任何Sexual Abuse的证据，受害者律师找到了？？？然后又discharge导演？？？？这个不符合常理吧
